steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The student’s claim hinges on the idea that The Horse Fair marks a significant change in Bonheur’s artistic development.
We need a quotation that shows a clear shift from her earlier work to something new.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
“The paintings that Bonheur produced before The Horse Fair can be thought of as belonging to her earlier style, to which she never returned.” states that the paintings before The Horse Fair belong to an earlier style she never returned to, directly indicating a change in her artistic direction.
The other three either praise the painting as her best work, note varied interpretations, or describe her as ahead of her time—none of these demonstrate a shift in her own development.
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
